titleStmt.title: SII 25.287: original edition by M. D. Sampath
No. 287. (A.R. No. 287 of 1908.) AḶAGĀDRIPUTTŪR, KUMBHAKONAM TALUK, THANJAVUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: East wall of the central shrine in Svarṇapurīśvara temple.
This damaged inscription begins with the praṁasti, Tirumagaḷ-pōlapperunilach-chelviyum, etc., of the king.

It records the grant of three mā of lands made tax-free (iṟaiyili) by the sabhai of Pā[ra*]dā[ya*]kuḍi, a brahmadēya in Tirunaraiyūr-nāḍu in Kshatriyaśikhāmaṇi-vaḷanāḍu by obtaining eight kāśu from Māṭilan Sōman Sūryyan of the above village. The details of the boundaries of the land endowed are specified.
This was drafted by madhyasthan of this village Vēṅkaṭavan Nārāyaṇan alias Āyirattumuṉṉūṟṟuvan under the orders of Pāradāyan Pudanārāyaṇan and Pāradāyan Kēśavan.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī tirumakaḷ polap perunilac celviyum taṉakke Urimai pūṇṭamaiyuḷ manakkoḷakāntaṉūrc cālai kalamaṟuttaruḷi veṅkai nāṭuṅ kaṅkapāṭiyum nuḷa
mpa pāṭiyum taṭikai pāṭiyum kuṭamalaināṭum kollamum kaliṅkamum Eṇṭicai pukaḻtara Īḻamaṇṭilamum raṭṭapāṭi Eḻarai Ilakkamum tiṇṭi
ṟal veṉṟittaṇṭāṟkoṇṭu ta ṉeḻil vaḷar Ūḻi Uḷ Ellā yāṇṭum toḻutaka viḷaṅku yāṇṭe ceḻiyarai tecukoḷ śrīkorājarājakesari varmmarāṉa śrī rājarājadevaṟkku yāṇṭu
Irupattu Iraṇṭāvatu kṣatriyacikhāmaṇi vaḷanāṭṭu tirunaraiyūrnāṭṭu brahmadeyam pāratāya kuṭi sabhai yom Ivvūr māṭilan coman sūryyan Ivvūr tirupputtūr ma
hādevarkku vaitta tirunontā viḷakku Oṉṟiṉukku kuṭutta nilamāvatu kkaṭaiya Iṟaiyili vaccaṉilam
vukku kiḻpāṟkellai ttār nilattukku merkkum teṉpāṟkellai vāykkālukku vaṭakkum mepāṟkellai pāratāyan vaṭukan nilattukku kiḻakkum vaṭa
pāṟkkellai Ittevar nilattukku teṟkku Ivvicaitta Ināṉkellaiyilum muṭpaṭṭa nila
ṉ muṉṟu mānilan muṉṟumāvum Iṟai Iḻiccu Ūṟk sabhaiyom I ṭak koṇṭa kācu
Eṭṭu Ikkācu Eṭṭuṅ koṇṭu Innilan tiru nontāviḷakkukkāka cantrādittavaṟ Iṟaiyiḻiccup paṇittu Ikkācu
Eṭṭu koṇṭu Innilan muṉṟumāvum Iṟaiyiliyāka paṇittom sabhaiyom Ipparicu paṇittār pāra
tāyan putanārāyāṇannum pāratāyan kecavan deva paṇiyālppaṇikka Eḻutineṉ Ivvūr madhya
sdhan veṅkaṭavan nārāyaṇa nāṉa Āyirattu muṉṉūṟṟuvanen Ivai Enneḻuttu §
Digital edition of SII 25.287 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
